Summons is accepted by learned counsel appearing for the defendant. 3. Learned counsel for the defendant, at the outset, submits that the defendant is the father of the plaintiff and is already 94 years of age. He, thus, submits that the matter be referred to mediation. 4. Issue notice in I.A. 10807/2026. Notice is accepted by learned counsel for the defendant. 5. In view of the submission by learned counsel for the defendant, and no objection from the plaintiff, this Court deems it appropriate to refer the matter to mediation. 6. Since the matter is being referred to mediation, no direction for filing written statement or the reply to I.A. 10807/2026 is being given for the time Page 1 of 2 This is a digitally signed order.
